phone_morning.recommendation: 🍳 Get out of bed and brush your teeth. Then, if it's nice weather, go out for a walk and eat breakfast out. If not, stay home and eat breakfast at home.

phone_afternoon.recommendation: 🚶🏻‍♀️ Go out for a walk and try to find somewhere quiet for a bit. Take a few minutes to relax, and then plan what you want to do for the rest of the day.

phone_evening.recommendation: 🚿 Take a shower if you haven't already. Then do a few minutes of stretching or PT. After that you can watch an anime episode as a treat.
